name: SetupComplete.cmd Exploitation
notes: This rule detects exploitation attempt of privilege escalation vulnerability via SetupComplete.cmd and PartnerSetupComplete.cmd.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

when the event matches ("Parent Command" ILIKE '%\cmd.exe%' AND "Parent Command" ILIKE '%/c%' AND "Parent Command" ILIKE '%C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\%' AND ("Parent Command" ILIKE '%SetupComplete.cmd' OR "Parent Command" ILIKE '%PartnerSetupComplete.cmd')) AQL filter query

when the event matches ("Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\Setup\%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY SetupComplete.cmd Exploitation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success

AND when the event matches ("Parent Command" ILIKE '%\cmd.exe%' AND "Parent Command" ILIKE '%/c%' AND "Parent Command" ILIKE '%C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\%' AND ("Parent Command" ILIKE '%SetupComplete.cmd' OR "Parent Command" ILIKE '%PartnerSetupComplete.cmd')) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ("Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\System32\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\SysWOW64\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\WinSxS\%' OR "Process File File Path" ILIKE 'C:\Windows\Setup\%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event description: Detects exploitation attempt of privilege escalation vulnerability via SetupComplete.cmd and PartnerSetupComplete.cmd.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
